treatment_information.treatment_response: Patient received IV tPA and was admitted to the ICU for further management.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient presented with acute onset of headache and disorientation.
Patient was transferred to another facility for further evaluation and treatment.
Further imaging showed dissection in the right internal carotid artery.
Patient started on blood thinning medication (Coumadin).

patient_outcome.final_status: Mental status clear and coherent; level of consciousness alert and interactive.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Patient's PCP should monitor INR levels after discharge from rehab.
